title: Docker Migration Plan
content:
Phase 1: containerize API services
Phase 2: migrate DB to managed PG
Phase 3: k8s orchestration

title: Chester Agent Architecture
content:
- Agents register via DB
- Skills map to integrations
- Flow builder connects agents
- Neural Cache for AI calls

title: Performance Optimization
content:
1. PgBouncer connection pooling
2. Redis for session cache
3. CDN for static assets
4. Lazy load heavy views
